Off Calendar Oct-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions - Defendant Kinyon Culinary Services' motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery and for award of monetary sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is awarded sanctions in the amount of $340.00. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK
